# 测试


::: {#thm-line}
## 直线定理

直线方程可以写为： $$ y = mx + b $$
:::

我们将通过三个步骤定义可测函数的积分。首先定义非负简单函数的积分。以下设 $E$ 是 $\mathcal{R}^n$ 中的可测集。


This file is a sample book demonstrating Quarto's capabilities with the standard LaTeX `book` document class. It supports PDF (via LaTeX) output. It is assumed that the reader has a basic working knowledge of stochastic calculus @karatzas1991brownian and stochastic control theory @yong1999sch.

## Introduction

Introduction \## acv

Introduction

## test for cosmo

IntroductionIntroductionIntroduction
